news.t: Small-Cap Awakening Sparks This Momentum ETF

holdings.infoBox: XSMO is an equity ETF with a total of 115 individual holdings. The top holdings are Viavi Solutions stock at 3.75%, Viasat at 3.24%, Sanmina at 2.83%, ESCO Technologies at 2.69%, and Krystal Biotech at 2.32%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Momentum ETF (XSMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P SmallCap 600 Momentum index. The fund tracks an index of US small-caps stocks selected by momentum. Holdings are weighted by a combination of market cap and momentum. XSMO was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Small-Cap Awakening Sparks This Momentum ETF
data.text: Momentum investing is often viewed as a large-cap-only concept. Conversations about its applications via ETFs often lead to products such as the Invesco S&P 500 Momentum ETF (SPMO).
